mapper.insert: INSERT INTO woorido.challenge_members ( id, challenge_id, user_id, role, deposit_status, entry_fee_amount, privilege_status, total_support_paid, auto_pay_enabled, joined_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{challengeId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{depositStatus}, #{entryFeeAmount}, #{privilegeStatus}, #{totalSupportPaid}, #{autoPayEnabled}, #{joinedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, challenge_id as challengeId, user_id as userId, role, joined_at as joinedAt, privilege_status as privilegeStatus FROM woorido.challenge_members WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT id as MEMBER_ID, challenge_id as CHALLENGE_ID, user_id as USER_ID, role as ROLE, joined_at as JOINED_AT, privilege_status as STATUS FROM woorido.challenge_members WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND challenge_id = #{challengeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: UPDATE woorido.challenge_members SET challenge_id = #{challengeId}, user_id = #{userId}, role = #{role}, joined_at = #{joinedAt}, privilege_status = 'ACTIVE', deposit_status = #{depositStatus}, entry_fee_amount = #{entryFeeAmount}, total_support_paid = #{totalSupportPaid}, auto_pay_enabled = #{autoPayEnabled}, left_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE woorido.challenge_members SET privilege_status = 'LEFT', left_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, leave_reason = #{leaveReason}, deposit_status = 'RELEASED' WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND privilege_status != 'LEFT'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woorido.challenge_members WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND privilege_status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT cm.user_id as USER_ID, u.nickname as NICKNAME, cm.joined_at as JOINED_AT, cm.role as ROLE FROM woorido.challenge_members cm JOIN woorido.users u ON cm.user_id = u.id WHERE cm.challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND cm.privilege_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY cm.joined_at ASC

SELECT cm.id as MEMBER_ID, cm.user_id as USER_ID, cm.role as ROLE, cm.privilege_status as STATUS, cm.joined_at as JOINED_AT, cm.total_support_paid as TOTAL_SUPPORT_PAID, u.nickname as NICKNAME, u.profile_image_url as PROFILE_IMAGE, COALESCE(us.total_score, 12) as BRIX FROM woorido.challenge_members cm JOIN woorido.users u ON cm.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN woorido.user_scores us ON u.id = us.user_id WHERE cm.challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND cm.id = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE woorido.challenge_members SET privilege_status = 'LEFT', left_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, deposit_status = 'RELEASED' WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_ID, USER_ID, JOINED_AT, BRIX FROM ( SELECT cm.id AS MEMBER_ID, cm.user_id AS USER_ID, cm.joined_at AS JOINED_AT, NVL(us.total_score, 12) AS BRIX FROM woorido.challenge_members cm LEFT JOIN woorido.user_scores us ON us.user_id = cm.user_id WHERE cm.challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND cm.privilege_status = 'ACTIVE' AND cm.user_id != #{excludedUserId} ORDER BY NVL(us.total_score, 12) DESC, cm.joined_at ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE woorido.challenge_members SET privilege_status = #{status}, privilege_revoked_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'REVOKED' THEN SYSTIMESTAMP ELSE NULL END WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, challenge_id as challengeId, user_id as userId, role, joined_at as joinedAt, privilege_status as privilegeStatus, last_support_paid_at as lastSupportPaidAt FROM woorido.challenge_members WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId}
